title: Project Init + Handoff Files
description: Create feature_list.json, claude-progress.txt, init.sh. Initialize Next.js project with Tailwind CSS.

title: Core Calculator Logic
description: Implement BMR (Mifflin-St Jeor) + TDEE calculation, unit toggle (metric/imperial), validation, health warning. Persist unit preference in localStorage.

title: Results Display + Chart
description: Summary cards (daily target, deficit, completion date, total calories), Chart.js line chart with milestone markers and hover tooltips, Recalculate button.

title: Responsive Design + UX Polish
description: Mobile-first CSS, breakpoints at 480/768/1024/1280px, hero section, smooth scroll, share buttons, Copy My Plan, design system (Inter font, pastel palette, rounded cards).

title: SEO Meta + Structured Data
description: Title/meta/OG/Twitter tags, JSON-LD FAQPage + WebApplication schemas, canonical URL, robots meta, sitemap.xml, robots.txt.

title: Content Pages
description: About, How It Works, FAQ (12 Q&A), Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Contact, Blog: calorie-deficit-guide, Blog: safe-weight-loss-rate. Minimum 600 words each.

title: Google Sheets Webhook + Visitor Counter
description: Apps Script Code.gs (doPost + doGet), fire-and-forget data collection on Calculate, async visitor counter in footer (Today/Total).

title: Ad Integration (Adsterra)
description: Adsterra async ad placements: native banner below hero, 300x250 rectangle sidebar/between-sections, social bar. ADSTERRA_KEY_HERE placeholders.

title: Feedback Widget + Contact Mechanisms
description: Floating feedback button, modal with textarea + email, POST to Apps Script feedback sheet. Footer business inquiry mailto. SPINAI branding.

title: GitHub + Vercel Deployment
description: gh repo create, git init + push, npx vercel --prod. Record live URL in claude-progress.txt.

title: Final QA + Lighthouse Audit
description: Post-deploy verification checklist, Lighthouse scores (Perf>=90, A11y>=90, SEO=100), fix issues, redeploy.
